meta.title: UPIN — Advanced Materials for a Brighter Future
meta.description: UPIN delivers next-generation material solutions engineered for semiconductors, aerospace and precision industries worldwide.

hero.title: Engineering the materials that power tomorrow.
hero.subtitle: From wide-bandgap semiconductors to precision optics, our team partners with industry leaders across 60+ countries to turn research into reliable supply.

products.title: Featured Products
products.subtitle: A focused portfolio, built around materials that matter.

substrate.title: Semiconductor Substrates
substrate.desc: High-purity wafers engineered for next-generation power and RF devices.

heatsink.title: Thermal Heat Spreaders
heatsink.desc: Industry-leading thermal conductivity for high-power electronics packaging.

optics.title: Precision Optical Windows
optics.desc: Aerospace-grade windows tuned for harsh-environment imaging and sensing.

crystal.title: Lab-Grown Crystals
crystal.desc: Custom-color specialty crystals for jewelry and industrial applications.

about.title: About UPIN
about.body: UPIN is a global advanced-materials company building the supply backbone for tomorrow's technology. We operate ISO 9001 certified facilities, invest heavily in R&D, and partner with customers from early prototype through high-volume manufacturing.

highlights.scale: Proven scale: from pilot runs to millions of units

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Built for the industries that demand the most from their materials.

semi.title: Semiconductors
semi.desc: Substrates, epitaxy and thermal management for power and RF.

aero.title: Aerospace
aero.desc: Optical windows and structural materials for harsh environments.

medical.title: Medical Devices
medical.desc: Biocompatible, high-precision components for critical devices.

luxury.title: Luxury Goods
luxury.desc: Lab-grown specialty crystals with verifiable provenance.

n1.title: UPIN opens second wafer fab to meet rising global demand

n2.title: New thermal heat spreader sets 2,600 W/m·K benchmark

n3.title: Strategic partnership announced with leading aerospace OEM

contact.title: Let's build what's next, together.
contact.subtitle: Whether you are prototyping, qualifying a supplier or scaling to volume, our team is ready to help.

promo.title: Inside the fab where diamonds become technology.
promo.subtitle: A short look at the process, the people, and the precision behind every wafer we ship.
